name: Chicken Pox Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the pancake mix and mashed bananas until well combined.
2. Fold in diced strawberries.
3. Pour batter onto a preheated griddle or frying pan.
4. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before flipping.
5. Cook until golden brown on both sides.
6. Turn off heat when ready.
